colors.description: Warm, organic, and elegant palette suitable for a premium beauty salon. Avoids harsh blacks and pure whites in backgrounds.

layout_patterns.dashboard: Bento grid mode B 'Control Room' grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Summary metrics span 1, Main charts span 2 or 3. Ensure all elements stretch to match neighbors.
layout_patterns.pos: Split layout for Point of Sale: Since it's RTL, place the product/services grid on the RIGHT (2/3 width) and the receipt/cart sidebar on the LEFT (1/3 width). Ensure fixed height with internal scrolling for the product grid.
layout_patterns.cards: Flat solid surfaces. Use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Use subtle ambient shadows (shadow-sm) and 1px borders using the --border variable.
layout_patterns.header: Sticky top, solid white background with a bottom border. Include user profile, notification bell, and a clear brand title. RTL layout (logo right, user left).

components.buttons: rounded-xl font-tajawal font-bold transition-all duration-200. Primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:opacity-90. Secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-border.
components.inputs: rounded-lg border-input bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all
components.tables: Clean, cardless or contained within a white card. Generous row padding (py-4), text-right for RTL. Use muted text for headers.
components.tabs: Pill-style or clean underline. Override default shadcn grey box; use --secondary color for the tab list background.
components.sidebar: Right-side navigation for RTL. Use white background with subtle left border. Active links should use primary color with a light primary background tint (e.g., bg-primary/10).

visual_enhancers.icons: lucide-react. Use stroke-width 1.5. Match with muted-foreground for inactive, primary for active.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Not recommended for accounting/POS. Stick to solid surfaces for data clarity and legibility.

motion.hover: Translate-y-[-2px] and slightly elevated shadow for interactive dashboard cards and POS products.
motion.list_stagger: Stagger children opacity and y-offset for lists (invoices, services).

login_background.description: Sleek beauty salon interior with contemporary furniture and lighting design.
login_background.usage: Background image for the login screen. Apply a dark or light overlay to ensure the login card stands out.

avatar_female.description: Professional portrait of a confident business woman.
avatar_female.usage: Default user avatar for the logged-in admin, manager, or cashier.

product_placeholder_1.description: Elegant skincare products with gold accents.
product_placeholder_1.usage: Thumbnail image for retail beauty products in the POS and inventory.

product_placeholder_2.usage: Thumbnail for another beauty product/service in POS.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the entire UI in RTL (Right-to-Left) with dir='rtl' on the root HTML. The primary language is Arabic.
Use EUR (€) for all currency formatting across the app (dashboard, POS, invoices, reports).
Add Google Fonts 'Tajawal' (Headings) and 'Cairo' (Body) to the index.html or import them in CSS.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows) MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Set up routing for the following views: Login, Dashboard, POS (Sales), Appointments (Calendar), Products/Inventory, Services, Customers (CRM), Invoices, and Financial Reports.
For the POS interface: Ensure a split view. As it's RTL, place the product/services selection grid on the right, and the active cart/invoice summary sidebar on the left.
Use Recharts for the revenue/profit charts on the dashboard. Use custom tooltips styled with the primary color.
Apply Tailwind configuration with the custom CSS variables defined in this guideline.
Customize Shadcn components heavily to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Use rounded-xl for cards, warm border colors, and generous spacing.
Ensure high contrast for data tables and invoice print views.
